description: Apply a configurable chain of signal-processing steps to spectra: smoothing (Gauss/SGolay), centroiding (PeakPickerHiRes), normalization (to_one/to_TIC), S/N filtering, and absolute-intensity thresholding. Steps run in a fixed order.
rules: writes the processed mzML under record_store as OUT_NAME
steps are opt-in via SMOOTH/PICK/NORMALIZE/THRESHOLD/SN flags
PICK=1 enables centroiding; MS_LEVEL restricts processing to one MS level
usage: Set INPUT and OUT_NAME (output .mzML). Optional SMOOTH(gauss|sgolay), PICK=1, NORMALIZE(to_one|to_TIC), THRESHOLD, SN, MS_LEVEL, GAUSSIAN_WIDTH, SIGNAL_TO_NOISE. Output: <OUT_NAME>.
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates the output file and records the reason.
